title: Savory American Shrimp Skewers
description: A herbal and velvety American dish featuring saeujeot-shrimp-paste, perfect for a date night, and Whole30-friendly. It is served on a wooden board.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together saeujeot-shrimp-paste, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated shrimp onto the soaked wooden skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
Place the skewers on a wooden board and broil for 8-10 minutes, or until the shrimp are pink and cooked through.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
Make sure to cook the shrimp to an internal temperature of at least 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Let the shrimp rest for a few minutes before serving.
